stemHtml: Which of the following correctly defines the Maximum Zero Fuel Mass?

options.a: A mass that varies depending on airport conditions.
options.b: A predetermined maximum mass, including unusable fuel, limited by the structural load-carrying capability of the airframe at the wing roots.
options.c: A mass that varies depending on the amount of take-off fuel and the maximum take-off mass.
options.d: A mass that includes the DOM and trip fuel.
